name: Crockpot Roast (French Dip Sandwich)
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim excess fat from the roast.
2. Place the roast in the crockpot.
3. Sprinkle the roast with the onion soup mix.
4. Pour the beer over the top of the roast.
5. Cook on low for about 8 hours, or until the meat is tender.
6. Once cooked, remove the roast from the crockpot and let it rest for a few minutes.
7. Cut or pull apart the roast into thin slices.
8. Serve the roast slices on hard rolls.
9. Use the juice from the crockpot to make an excellent dipping sauce.
